title: Recommended EVA 01 figure to buy
wikitext:
[]: Recommended EVA 01 figure to buy             Quote Post by ApolloIVtv » Thu Nov 14, 2013 10:41 pm Does anyone have any recommendations on EVA 01 figures I could get. I'm looking for one that's not too expensive ($40's my target range but $80 is my limit), and is good enough model to not too many, or any, pieces really fall apart. So far I'm looking at this one: [url]http://www.amazon.com/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-EVA-01-Package/dp/B000E5ZL0A[/url] I'm mostly looking for figures that I actually move around and do stuff with (like an action figure), than ones that you can pose but you can't really tamper much with.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Nov 14, 2013 11:50 pm I believe this a repackaged version of the Metallic Repaints that Kaiyodo Xebec came out with years ago.
